generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring motor current (I_M) of the permanent magnet synchronous motor on the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing motor encoder position outputs."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionStream
]

instance GearEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the gearbox providing gear encoder position outputs."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearEncoderPositionStream
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearEncoderPositionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) trace captured from the motor current sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AASEnabler, ACMEApisEnabler, SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor encoder position trace captured from the motor encoder sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AASEnabler, ACMEApisEnabler, SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance GearEncoderPositionRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder position trace captured from the gear encoder sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearEncoderPositionStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, AASEnabler, ACMEApisEnabler, SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Coulomb–Viscous friction model for the motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Stribeck friction model for the motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Dahl friction model for the motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the LuGre friction model for the motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimEnabler
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for real‑time data streaming from sensors to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance SimulinkSimEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for running simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing asset metadata for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance ACMEApisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME standard APIs for asset description and integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard used to visualize real‑time data and insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time data integration by ingesting sensor streams via MQTT, enriching with AAS metadata, and making data available to downstream models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProcessingInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides a web‑based dashboard for visualizing real‑time data and derived insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides ViewDashboardAction
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Combines white‑box analytical models and data‑driven models to identify friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, ControllerTuningInsight, UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies load and temperature effects by integrating multi‑physics models for motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides LoadTemperatureEffectInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction parameters from combined white‑box and data‑driven models."
]

instance LoadTemperatureEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Understanding of how load and temperature affect friction behavior."
]

instance ControllerTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides recommendations for controller tuning based on discovered friction dynamics."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggests potential maintenance actions based on friction parameter trends."
]

instance DataProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides insights derived from real‑time data integration and processing."
]

instance ViewDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to view the real‑time dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction models when new parameter data is available."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time continuous streaming and processing of sensor data, with synchronization performed locally in the shadow; no explicit delay or sampling interval is specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Constituents include data traces, processing components (simulation and data calculation), models (engineering, simulation, data calculation), asset and system properties, all orchestrated to feed a unified dashboard that visualizes real and simulated motor/gear outputs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage – the twin operates on the manufactured robot during its operation for monitoring friction and updating models; design and manufacturing phases are not covered."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Emphasis on traceability of data points back to source and processing path; combined use of white‑box and black‑box models for higher accuracy; explicit validation procedures or uncertainty quantification are not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data flows over MQTT from PT sensors to the digital shadow; Asset Administration Shells provide asset metadata; network details (protocols and architecture) are not elaborated."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards cited include SysML (ISO/IEC 19509), ACME (domain‑specific ADL), AADL, MontiArc, and Asset Administration Shells (Open Connectivity Foundation)."
]
